integrations.name: Atlassian (Jira + Confluence)
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Claude Code will open a browser to authorize with your Atlassian account
2. No token needed — OAuth is handled automatically

integrations.name: Linear
integrations.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, and cycles
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Claude Code will open a browser to authorize with your Linear account
2. No token needed — OAuth is handled automatically

integrations.name: Fathom (Meeting Recordings)
integrations.description: Access meeting transcripts and AI summaries
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Go to https://app.fathom.video/settings/api
2. Click 'Generate API Key'
3. Copy the key and paste below

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.description: Read channels, send messages, search workspace
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Go to https://api.slack.com/apps → 'Create New App' → 'From Scratch'
2. Name it (e.g. 'Claude Code') and select your workspace
3. 'OAuth & Permissions' → Bot Token Scopes → Add:
     channels:read  channels:history  chat:write  users:read
4. 'Install to Workspace' → copy the Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...)
5. Your Team ID is in the Slack URL: app.slack.com/client/TXXXXXXXX

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.description: Read repos, issues, PRs, and code search
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens
2. 'Generate new token (classic)'
3. Select scopes: repo, read:org
4. Copy the token (ghp_...)

integrations.name: Notion
integrations.description: Read and write Notion pages and databases
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Go to https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations
2. 'New integration' → name it → copy the token (ntn_...)
3. Share target pages/databases with your integration:
     Open the page → Share → Invite → select your integration

integrations.name: ClickUp
integrations.description: Manage tasks, lists, folders, docs, and time tracking
integrations.setup_notes:
1. Go to https://app.clickup.com/settings/apps
2. Under 'API Token', click 'Generate'
3. Copy your personal API token (pk_...)

integrations.name: Google Workspace
integrations.description: Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar — via Python skills
integrations.instructions:
Google Workspace is handled via Python skills (better OAuth support).

  Already configured in this repo:
    Drive (Work):    .agent/skills/work-drive-connector/gdrive_manager.py
    Drive (Personal): .agent/skills/google-drive-connector/gdrive_manager.py
    Calendar:         .agent/skills/google-calendar-connector/gcal_manager.py
    Docs creator:     .agent/skills/gdocs-create/gdocs_create.py

  To re-authenticate: delete the token.json in the skill folder,
  then run the skill — it will open a browser to re-authorize.
